short_summary: Iran deal, Tren de Aragua, Musk trillionaire
rationale: Iran deal remains the top concern for US residents given potential military and oil market implications; Tren de Aragua airstrike is a continuation; Musk's SpaceX IPO milestone is notable but market-level noise.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump claims Sunday signing, Tehran contradicts
top_events.summary: Trump insists a nuclear/sanctions deal with Iran will be signed Sunday while Iranian officials contradict the timeline — unresolved uncertainty with direct implications for US foreign policy and oil prices.

top_events.title: US kills Tren de Aragua leader in airstrike
top_events.summary: Trump confirms a US airstrike killed the leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang, continuing the administration's aggressive posture on gang-linked threats. Continuation of established pattern.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Anthropic continues to hold back new AI tool releases due to federal security review — ongoing policy friction affecting the US AI sector and innovation pace.
